data.title: Cardano expected to reach $1.00 in 7 days; may surge to $1.12 in weeks. Bullish trend predicted based on technical indicators.
data.description: The forecast for ADA's price indicates a positive trend aiming for the $1.00 mark as various technical indicators are in alignment. Predictions for Cardano suggest a potential surge towards the $1.12 range in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: CBO warns Trump's immigration policies will shrink US GDP, with U.S. population projected to decline, estimating 290,000 immigrants to be removed by 2029, impacting labor force.
data.description: The U.S. population growth is forecasted to decline faster due to President Donald Trump's immigration policies, resulting in more deaths than births from 2031, two years earlier than projected. The Congressional Budget Office attributes this to reduced immigration and fertility rates caused by Trump's 2025 reconciliation act, which allocates $170 billion for immigration and border enforcement, including $29.9 billion for ICE operations and the hiring of 10,000 officers. The CBO estimates around 290,000 immigrants will be removed from the country between 2026 and 2029, with about 50,000 immigrants detained daily during this period, significantly impacting the labor force.

data.title: XRP price aims for $3.30 by month-end, surpassing $3.02 resistance with bullish momentum and strong technical setup.
data.description: According to recent XRP price predictions, the cryptocurrency is demonstrating a bullish trend above the $3.02 mark and is expected to reach $3.30 in the next 4 weeks. Technical analysis suggests a robust setup for Ripple's potential upward movement in the near future.

data.title: Price of BNB expected to reach $950-$1,000 in short term due to bullish momentum and technical signals.
data.description: The prediction for the price of BNB is indicating a significant upward movement, with projected targets ranging between $950 and $1,000 within the next month. This positive outlook is supported by technical indicators that suggest a continued rally in the near future.

data.title: ETH price expected to reach $5,200-$5,500 by October 2025 with technical breakout on the horizon.
data.description: Ethereum is expected to reach a target price range of $5,200 to $5,500 in the next 4 to 6 weeks, as it has surpassed crucial resistance levels. Strong momentum indicators suggest further upward movement for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Bitcoin's price could hit $125,000 by October 2025 after bullish breakout with immediate resistance at $124,474.
data.description: Experts are forecasting that the price of Bitcoin (BTC) could surge to $125,000 in the next 6 weeks, supported by positive technical indicators. Key resistance is currently at $124,474, which needs to be surpassed to achieve even higher price targets.

data.title: Kalshi vows to protect prediction markets in face of Massachusetts lawsuit, accusing state of inhibiting innovation with old laws.
data.description: According to statements made to a news outlet, Kalshi alleged that Massachusetts is attempting to impede Kalshi's advancements by using antiquated legislation.

data.title: Hapbee appoints new leaders to drive product strategy & deployments, shares-for-debt settlement update.
data.description: Hapbee has recently introduced new leadership positions with the goal of expediting the company's product strategy and hastening product deployments. These new roles are intended to drive rapid progress in advancing Hapbee's offerings and achieving faster market penetration. The company is focusing on enhancing efficiency and effectiveness in order to swiftly bring their products to consumers. This strategic move is part of Hapbee's initiative to streamline operations and capitalize on market opportunities. These new leadership roles will play a vital role in ensuring that Hapbee reaches its targets and makes significant strides in the industry.

data.title: New owner of Publishers Clearing House, ARB Interactive, paid $7.1M but won't pay past winners in doubt of additional payouts.
data.description: ARB Interactive recently acquired the company for $7.1 million after it filed for bankruptcy protection. The acquisition has raised concerns about additional funds that may be provided to previous winners.

data.title: NCL Corporation Ltd. disclosed results of debt tender offer to buy back all outstanding 5.875% Senior Secured Notes due 2027 & 5.875% Senior Notes due 2026.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, NCL Corporation Ltd. ("NCLC"), a subsidiary of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NCLH), reported the outcomes of its recent cash tender offer, known as the "Tender Offer." This offer aimed to buy back all outstanding (i) 5.875% Senior Secured Notes due 2027 (the "2027 Notes") and (ii) 5.875% Senior Notes due 2026 (the "2026 Notes"). The Tender Offer, as outlined in the Offer to Purchase dated September 8, 2025, and the accompanying Notice of Guaranteed Delivery, sought to purchase any and all of these Notes. For further information on this, the public can refer to the Offer to Purchase document. Important details and terms related to the Tender Offer can be found within these provided documents.

data.title: XTM Inc. (CSE: PAID) informs stakeholders about a CPAB notice in a press release from August 29, 2025 for transparency.
data.description: In Toronto, XTM Inc. (DBA AnyDay) (CSE: PAID), a prominent fintech company specializing in automated tip pooling, instant payouts, and Earned Wage Access (EWA) through its AnyDay™ platform, has provided an update to stakeholders regarding a notice from the Canadian Public Accountability Board (CPAB). The company, in adherence to its commitment to transparency and regulatory conformity, released a press statement on August 29, 2025 (the "August 29 Release"), which can be accessed on SEDAR. This development underscores the company's dedication to regulatory compliance and open communication.

data.title: CEOs and spine surgeon Dr. Kingsley R. Chin cleared of all anti-kickback charges after 7 years; accepted plea settlement.
data.description: Following a seven-year inquiry by the Department of Justice (DOJ), Dr. Chin has been cleared of all initial Anti-Kickback allegations. However, he has decided to settle for a plea deal regarding a single violation related to Open Payments reporting. With this behind him, Dr. Chin is now focused on propelling pioneering spine surgery advancements on a global scale. This development came out of FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. in September.

data.title: AI startup Astrus raises $8M USD led by Khosla Ventures to accelerate microchip design. Includes funding from various investors.
data.description: In Toronto and Waterloo, Ontario, Astrus, an AI startup focusing on developing the world's initial physics-aware foundation model for chip design, disclosed raising $8 million USD in funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Khosla Ventures and also included contributions from Pradeep Sindhu, the founder of Juniper Networks, as well as 1517 Fund, Drive Capital, Alumni Ventures, and several other strategic investors. The company is addressing the challenge posed by the analog segment in sophisticated semiconductor design, which hasn't seen the same level of automation as digital chip design.

data.title: U.S. Army awards $10B ITES-4H contract to 49 vendors including Strategic Communications in Louisville.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on September 12, 2025, the U.S. Army disclosed the approval of the Information Technology Enterprise Solutions – 4 Hardware (ITES-4H) agreement. This contract serves as a broad procurement mechanism with a maximum value of $10 billion. It is an indefinite-delivery agreement that will encompass various technology hardware services for the U.S. Army.
Aja Health And Wellness Inc. reports delay in financial statement filing, essential information for investors.

data.title: Humane World for Animals collaborates with Christian Siriano at NY Fashion Week, showcases 3 cruelty-free pieces.
data.description: A worldwide charity recently introduced three exclusive animal-friendly items in Siriano's Autumn presentation, showcasing a design inspired by animals from its redefined emblem. The event took place in New York on September 12, 2025. Previously known as the Humane Society of the United States and Humane World for Animals, the organization debuted these products produced without cruelty.

data.title: Hollyland WeConnect 2025 ends after 2 months with global celebration, culminating on Hollyland Brand Day.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, Hollyland wrapped up its WeConnect 2025 campaign which spanned almost two months. The campaign culminated on the Hollyland Brand Day, symbolizing the closure of a worldwide initiative integrating technology, culture, and creativity. This campaign engaged in various activities over the past weeks to connect with a global audience.

data.title: Stocks like Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, and Tesla were significant movers. Apple's iPhone event upcoming. Dow Jones Futures report by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Stocks such as Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, and Tesla saw significant movement on Monday, impacting Dow Jones Futures. These companies have been highlighted as key players to watch. Investors are now looking forward to the upcoming Apple iPhone event. The market is abuzz with anticipation for the latest developments in the tech industry.

data.title: Dow rose, Nasdaq hit high, Robinhood surged, Tesla, Amazon tested buy points. Elon Musk deal impacts a stock.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight increase in the stock market. Robinhood witnessed a significant surge, while Tesla and Amazon reached record highs. A stock also saw a notable increase following a deal involving Elon Musk. Overall, the market performance included the Dow rising, and the Nasdaq reaching a new high. Notable movements were observed in Amazon and Tesla, as they tested attractive buy points.

data.title: EQT completes public stock offering for Waystar Holding Corp, raising $705.8 million with EQT receiving $304.5 million.
data.description: An underwritten public offering has successfully generated total proceeds of approximately USD $705.8 million, with EQT receiving around USD $304.5 million. The news was disclosed by an affiliate of EQT VIII, with the announcement made in New York on September 12, 2025.
